item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3h This is going to be extraordinary. One final instalment of the Up Series.
The greates
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3h This is going to be extraordinary. One final instalment of the Up Series.
The greatest ITV show of all time for me and always deeply moving television. Cita ITV @ITV · 17h 70 Up is back… one last time.
From 1964 to now, the groundbreaking television journey that has followed the lives of 14 people completes its final chapter 1 146

item.title: livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 3h "𝙄𝙩 𝙝𝙪𝙧𝙩 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙞𝙙 𝙄 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙛𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙞𝙨𝙝 𝙗𝙤𝙩𝙩𝙤𝙢. 𝙄𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙤𝙮𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙚 𝙖 𝙗𝙞𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙗𝙚 𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚𝙨𝙩
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 3h "𝙄𝙩 𝙝𝙪𝙧𝙩 𝙬𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙨𝙖𝙞𝙙 𝙄 𝙬𝙖𝙨 𝙛𝙖𝙫𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙞𝙩𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙞𝙨𝙝 𝙗𝙤𝙩𝙩𝙤𝙢. 𝙄𝙩 𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙤𝙮𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙚 𝙖 𝙗𝙞𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙗𝙚 𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚𝙨𝙩."
Recap & reaction as Clayton defies the odds again in Rotterdam De live-darts.com 11 805

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5h Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
T
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5h Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
Thank you to our various guests - @RoddyBisset , @_ShaneMacD and @robwalkertv - as we look ahead to the World Championship.
Reflections too on the John Virgo Memorial. open.spotify.com Talking Snooker Episode 249 - LIVE FROM SHEFFIELD: World Championship 2026 Preview Talking Snooker · Episode 4 8 338

item.title: joshpearson180: Josh @joshpearson180 · 5h Rivaldo and WHO Cita 90s Football @90sfootball · 5h Dennis Bergkamp and Rivaldo x Pepsi 1 6 4
item.description: Josh @joshpearson180 · 5h Rivaldo and WHO Cita 90s Football @90sfootball · 5h Dennis Bergkamp and Rivaldo x Pepsi 1 6 4 mil
